payload.title: Annual Procurement Report FY 2025
payload.description: All-agency annual procurement report listing MTA contract transactions across fiscal years

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: No transit project, route, or corridor data

payload.gap_text: Document is an all-agency annual procurement report (FY 2025) listing MTA contract transactions only; does not contain bus route, corridor, project, treatment, event, claim, or metric information relevant to transit service improvements.
